vocab.meaning: sự đô thị hóa không kiểm soát
vocab.example: The area surrounding my apartment has seen unbridled urbanization, with concrete towers springing up almost overnight.

vocab.meaning: mặt tiền bằng kính lung linh
vocab.example: There is a massive corporate headquarters nearby that features a shimmering glass facade, reflecting the sky in a very striking way.
Being proximate to several financial towers means my neighborhood feels very much like a modern business district.

vocab.meaning: một rừng cần cẩu (ám chỉ khu vực đang xây dựng mạnh)
vocab.example: Currently, if you look out from my balcony, you’ll see a forest of cranes working on the next generation of skyscrapers.

vocab.meaning: ảnh hưởng của phong cách kiến trúc Thô mộc (bê tông khối)
vocab.example: The older apartment blocks near my home show a heavy brutalist influence, standing in sharp contrast to the newer, sleeker designs.

vocab.meaning: một đô thị lớn trải dài
vocab.example: Living in such a sprawling metropolis, it is almost impossible not to be surrounded by multi-story structures.

vocab.meaning: thay đổi diện mạo khu phố (thường là sang trọng hóa)
vocab.example: The decision to build those high-end office towers was clearly intended to gentrify the neighborhood and attract more affluent residents.

vocab.meaning: tỷ lệ lấp đầy cao ngất ngưởng
vocab.example: Despite their intimidating size, these buildings maintain sky-high occupancy because of their central location.

vocab.meaning: nằm gọn lỏn giữa, được bao bọc bởi
vocab.example: My modest two-story house is now nestled among giant commercial blocks, giving the street a very eclectic feel.

vocab.meaning: sự sắp đặt cạnh nhau tạo ra tương phản về thị giác
vocab.example: There is a fascinating visual juxtaposition between the ancient pagoda nearby and the ultra-modern towers towering over it.
